title: aster patens var. phlogifolius
intro: Aster patens var. phlogifolius, also known as the red starflower, is a perennial plant with bright yellow flowers and red stamens, belonging to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other compounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and soothing skin irritations, as well as exhibiting potential antiviral and antibacterial properties. Aster patens var. phlogifolius can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health conditions.
